'''鈭歴h-ch-ng''' ('''shachanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nakedise|nakedise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nakedise|nakedise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-ch-ng
|-
! Lemma
| shachanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachangithi|shachangithi]] || [[word:shachangiji|shachangiji]] || [[word:shachangishi|shachangishi]] || [[word:shachangi|shachangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachanguthuth|shachanguthuth]] || [[word:shachangujuj|shachangujuj]] || [[word:shachangushush|shachangushush]] || [[word:shachang|shachang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachanguthu|shachanguthu]] || [[word:shachanguju|shachanguju]] || [[word:shachangushu|shachangushu]] || [[word:shachangu|shachangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachangufuth|shachangufuth]] || [[word:shachangufuj|shachangufuj]] || [[word:shachangufush|shachangufush]] || [[word:shachanguf|shachanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachangethe|shachangethe]] || [[word:shachangeje|shachangeje]] || [[word:shachangeshe|shachangeshe]] || [[word:shachange|shachange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachangothoth|shachangothoth]] || [[word:shachangojoj|shachangojoj]] || [[word:shachangoshosh|shachangoshosh]] || [[word:shachang|shachang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachangotho|shachangotho]] || [[word:shachangojo|shachangojo]] || [[word:shachangosho|shachangosho]] || [[word:shachango|shachango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachangofoth|shachangofoth]] || [[word:shachangofoj|shachangofoj]] || [[word:shachangofosh|shachangofosh]] || [[word:shachangof|shachangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachang忙th忙|shachang忙th忙]] || [[word:shachang忙j忙|shachang忙j忙]] || [[word:shachang忙sh忙|shachang忙sh忙]] || [[word:shachang忙|shachang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachangathath|shachangathath]] || [[word:shachangajaj|shachangajaj]] || [[word:shachangashash|shachangashash]] || [[word:shachang|shachang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachangatha|shachangatha]] || [[word:shachangaja|shachangaja]] || [[word:shachangasha|shachangasha]] || [[word:shachanga|shachanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachangafath|shachangafath]] || [[word:shachangafaj|shachangafaj]] || [[word:shachangafash|shachangafash]] || [[word:shachangaf|shachangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shachangasha|shachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachangasha|goshachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachangasha|gokishachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shachangn眉sha|shachangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachangnkn眉sha|goshachangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangn眉sha|gokishachangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachangsh毛sha|shachangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachangnksh毛sha|goshachangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachangsh毛sha|gokishachangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangrosha|shachangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangnkrosha|goshachangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangrosha|gokishachangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangmusha|shachangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangnkmusha|goshachangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangmusha|gokishachangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachangsherasha|shachangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachangnksherasha|goshachangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachangsherasha|gokishachangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachangasha|shachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachangnkngasha|goshachangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachangasha|gokishachangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachangyasha|shachangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachangnkyasha|goshachangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachangyasha|gokishachangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachangyamasha|shachangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachangnkyamasha|goshachangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachangyamasha|gokishachangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachangn眉sh毛sha|shachangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachangnkn眉sh毛sha|goshachangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachangn眉sh毛sha|gokishachangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangn眉rosha|shachangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangnkn眉rosha|goshachangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangn眉rosha|gokishachangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangn眉musha|shachangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangnkn眉musha|goshachangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangn眉musha|gokishachangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachangsh毛n眉sha|shachangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachangnksh毛n眉sha|goshachangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangsh毛n眉sha|gokishachangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangsh毛rosha|shachangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangnksh毛rosha|goshachangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangsh毛rosha|gokishachangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangsh毛musha|shachangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangnksh毛musha|goshachangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangsh毛musha|gokishachangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachangron眉sha|shachangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachangnkron眉sha|goshachangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangron眉sha|gokishachangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachangrosh毛sha|shachangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachangnkrosh毛sha|goshachangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachangrosh毛sha|gokishachangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachangromusha|shachangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachangnkromusha|goshachangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachangromusha|gokishachangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachangmun眉sha|shachangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachangnkmun眉sha|goshachangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachangmun眉sha|gokishachangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachangmush毛sha|shachangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachangnkmush毛sha|goshachangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachangmush毛sha|gokishachangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachangmurosha|shachangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachangnkmurosha|goshachangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachangmurosha|gokishachangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shachang|shachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙ch忙ng|sh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshachang|hoshachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙ch忙ng|hosh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshachang|hohoshachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙ch忙ng|hohosh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shachang|n眉shachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙ch忙ng|n眉sh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shachang|n眉n眉shachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙ch忙ng|n眉n眉sh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shachang|n茂shachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙ch忙ng|n茂sh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shachang|n茂n茂shachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙ch忙ng|n茂n茂sh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushachang|lushachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙ch忙ng|lush忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushachang|lulushachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙ch忙ng|lulush忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishachang|lishachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙ch忙ng|lish忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishachang|lilishachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙ch忙ng|lilish忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshachang|koshachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙ch忙ng|kosh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshachang|kokoshachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙ch忙ng|kokosh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshachang|keshachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙ch忙ng|kesh忙ch忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshachang|kekeshachang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙ch忙ng|kekesh忙ch忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
